Module com.code
Package com.code

Class SpeedingController

java.lang.Object
com.code.SpeedingController
public class SpeedingController extends Object
The SpeedingController class controls the behavior and functionality of the application's UI elements. It manages the TableView for displaying ticket records, animation of vehicles, and interaction with simulation buttons.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller's components and sets up the initial state.

    • initAnimator

      public void initAnimator(VehicleAnimator animator)
      Initializes the VehicleAnimator for the controller.
      Parameters:
      animator - The VehicleAnimator instance to be initialized.

    • generateCar

      public void generateCar(Vehicle vehicle)
      Generates a car on the wires based on the provided vehicle object.
      Parameters:
      vehicle - The vehicle object containing information about the car.

    • addRecord

      public void addRecord(TableRecord record)
      Adds a new record to the tickets table.
      Parameters:
      record - The TableRecord object to be added to the table.

    • incrementDeservedTotal

      public void incrementDeservedTotal()
      Increment the deserved total by the number of tickets issued. This method updates the text of the deservedTotalLabel to reflect the new total.

    • showAddedLabel

      public void showAddedLabel()
      Shows the 'added' label.

    • hideAddedLabel

      public void hideAddedLabel()
      Hides the 'added' label.
